creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Andreas Kempe from comment #0)
Hello Andreas,

I've just committed missing run depends to main and quarterly.

Now I'm investigating why www/py-httpx013 and www/py39-httpx could not coexist on same system:

###
Checking integrity... done (1 conflicting)
  - py39-httpx-0.25.2 conflicts with py39-httpx013-0.13.3_3 on /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/httpx/__init__.py
###

Thanks
